title: pteris rufescens
intro: Pteris rufescens, also known as the 'Horse Tail Fern', is a species of fern that belongs to the family Pteridaceae. It is native to tropical Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pteris rufescens include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or infused oil, and is often consumed as a supplement in capsule or powder form to reap its medicinal benefits.
